step_rationale: Ceramide biomarker in ACS; lipid-driven inflammation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: Cer(d18:1/16:0) is a bioactive ceramide lipid associated with coronary artery disease severity and acute coronary syndrome prognosis.

Prognostic Value of Ceramide Dynamics in Patients with Acute Coronary Syndrome.

references.title: Association between ceramides and coronary artery stenosis in patients with coronary artery disease.
